title: The Taking of the Solemn Oaths in the Ka bah by the Two Princes
description: by the Two Princes He related: Hirun made the Pilgrimage, accompanied by Muhammad and 'Abdallih and by his military commanders, ministers and judges, in the year i 8618o2). He left behind at al-Raqqah Ibrahim b. `Uthmin b. Nahik al-`Akin in charge of his womenfolk, the treasuries and material wealth, and the army, and he despatched his son al-Qasim to Manbij672 and then installed him there with the military commanders and soldiers whom he had attached to alQasim's side.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
